description: Real-speech regression scenarios. The audio_text is read aloud by a system TTS (espeak-ng on Linux, say on macOS); the burn_text is rendered into the video frame. Mismatches are intentional so the full ASR + OCR + compare pipeline must catch them.

segments.audio_text: the burned in subtitle checker is open source.
segments.burn_text: the burned in subtitle checker is open source.

segments.audio_text: we ship updates every friday afternoon.
segments.burn_text: we ship updates every monday afternoon.

segments.audio_text: tests catch regressions before they reach users.
segments.burn_text: tests catch regressions before they reach users.

segments.audio_text: subtitles must match the spoken dialogue.
this segment has no burned in subtitle on screen.
open source quality assurance saves time.

segments.audio_text: the editor reviews flagged segments quickly.
segments.burn_text: the producer rejects flagged segments quickly.
